title: Wither's Blades
description: A simple mod that adds some new swords and such.
body: A fun and simple mod that adds a few more swords to the game. This mod works great as a small mod, possibly good for adding to a modpack, to amp up the common vanilla. This mod will constantly be updated, but will, for the most part, stay Forge 1.20.1. This mod intruduces some new, quirky swords, and advancements. It can easily be used with forge. It is also highly combatible with other mods. I hope you enjoy this fun little mod, Wither's Blades!
